title: rate limiting behavior is undocumented
expectedBehavior: All implemented functions should be documented in the spec.
observedBehavior: The login function calls shouldRateLimit which is not mentioned in the spec.

deterministicFacts.statement: The spec does not mention rate limiting.
The implementation includes a shouldRateLimit helper called in login.

inference: Rate limiting was added intentionally but not documented; this gap should be closed.
